summary: Backend: 20/20 pytest tests passed including auth, knowledge CRUD, resources, admin, announcements, analytics, SSE chat streaming, feedback, tickets. Frontend: Admin portal end-to-end (login, KB module creation, resources, users, AI config, announcement creation, tickets) and User portal end-to-end (register, welcome screen, AI streamed response, feedback, conversation history) all working. Found and fixed a CRITICAL frontend infinite redirect loop in axios interceptor that prevented login page from loading.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='stat-total_questions' likely attached only after analytics fetch completes; was not visible on first navigation (skeleton loading state). Cards eventually render but stat-* testids may be missing on skeletons.

integration_issues.issue: Could not match a [data-testid^='create-ticket-'] element via Playwright. A ticket icon is rendered next to feedback buttons (visible in screenshot) but the data-testid may use a different naming. Backend ticket creation API is fully verified working.

action_items: (Already fixed by me) Confirm /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js fix is acceptable - axios 401 interceptor was redirecting to /login on every /auth/me call, causing infinite reload loop on the login page. Patch: skip redirect for /auth/me, /auth/refresh, /auth/login, /auth/register and skip redirect when already on /login.
Verify the exact data-testid for the 'Create Ticket from AI response' button in UserPortal.js (currently expecting create-ticket-* prefix). Backend ticket API works fine.
Consider adding data-testid='stat-...' to skeleton placeholders OR loading state so tests can detect dashboard render regardless of network speed.
Pydantic models have no email validation (UserCreate accepts arbitrary strings). Consider EmailStr.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is a browser-rejected combination per the CORS spec; works only in dev. Configure explicit origins for production.

Bcrypt hash format check: passwords are hashed with bcrypt.gensalt() (default 12 rounds); admin hash starts with $2b$ (verified by login succeeding). Brute-force lockout (5 attempts) verified in code.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: api.js axios response interceptor caused infinite redirect loop on /login (window.location.href='/login' when already on /login).
auth_routes.user_out uses str(user['_id']) for serialization but other routes call a separate serialize() helper - some duplication across knowledge/admin/chat routes.

chat_routes.send_message saves a user message before AI call; if AI fails the user msg still exists but an error message is also saved (acceptable, but ensure logging surfaces the underlying provider error).
Resources router does not enforce a url for video/document - ResourceCreate has url='' default. Frontend should require url for video.
Several routes raise HTTPException with positional args (e.g., HTTPException(400, '...')) - works but inconsistent.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% (all main flows working; minor selector mismatches for create-ticket button only)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@biziverse.com / Admin@123 (super_admin). Test users prefixed TEST_ are auto-created during tests.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed modules, topics, items, resources, announcements, tickets. Module-scoped fixtures clean up modules & resources but topics/items/announcements/tickets are left in DB for next iteration to verify admin views.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all main endpoints incl. SSE chat streaming. Frontend has a fixed axios interceptor - confirm api.js change is what main agent wants. If main agent prefers a different fix (e.g., move the redirect to a React-Router-aware location), update accordingly. Create-ticket-* data-testid prefix from review_request did not match anything in DOM - main agent should verify exact testid in UserPortal.js.
